_notes.profile: local = local MLX transcription; cloud = Azure transcription. This is for humans; speech.backend is what the app reads.
_notes.local_model: Runtime local model location. If path is set, the app uses that local directory and does not need network for the model.
_notes.model_download: Download/install sources. These are only used when fetching models, not during normal runtime once local_model.path exists.
_notes.azure: Cloud settings. Fill endpoint and sign in from the app if speech.backend or polish.engine is azure.

azure._note: Used only for Azure speech or Azure polish.
